overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a stormy forest at dusk. The character traverses a mountainous woodland area with pine trees, passing wooden debris and a broken cart while lightning flashes in the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with wooden barricades

events.description: lightning flashes in the dark sky above the mountain range

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, moving through the stormy forest

entered.detail: dark silhouetted mountains against the stormy sky
dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
tall pine trees on the right side of the trail
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
broken wooden fence or barricade alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, stormy forest trail with Geralt walking away from the camera. Wooden barricades line the left side of the dirt path while dense pine forests flank both sides. Lightning flashes briefly in the sky above the distant mountain range, illuminating the scene with a brief flash of light.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with abandoned wagon debris

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing the remains of a broken cart

entered.detail: destroyed wooden cart with wheels lying on its side

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues walking along the forest trail, passing a broken wooden cart that lies abandoned on the right side of the path. The wooden barricades from the previous section fall behind as the trail continues through the dense pine forest under the stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley trail approaching water

events.description: stream or creek becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through a more open section of the forest with the valley visible ahead

entered.detail: narrow stream or creek running parallel to the path on the left

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider mountain valley view as Geralt continues forward. A stream becomes visible on the left side of the trail, running parallel to the path through the grass. The broken cart is left behind as the forest thins slightly, revealing more of the stormy sky above.

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the stream with flowering bushes visible on the right

entered.detail: bushes with white and purple flowers lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Geralt walks alongside the stream which now runs close to the left side of the path. Flowering bushes with white blossoms appear on the right, adding color to the otherwise dark and stormy forest scene. The mountains remain visible in the distance as the trail continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, stormy forest trail that gradually opens into a wider mountain valley. It begins with Geralt walking away from the camera along a dirt path lined with wooden barricades, while brief flashes of lightning illuminate the dense pine forests and distant mountains. As he continues forward, the barricades fall behind and the camera passes an abandoned, broken wooden cart resting on the right side of the trail. The scene then expands as the forest thins, revealing a stream running parallel to the path on the left and a broader view of the stormy sky. Finally, the trail leads alongside the flowing water and past flowering bushes with white blossoms, while the mountains remain visible in the distance.
